references.hebrew: לֹ֥א תִשָּׂ֛א אֶת־שֵֽׁם־יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֶ֖יךָ לַשָּׁ֑וְא כִּ֣י לֹ֤א יְנַקֶּה֙ יְהֹוָ֔ה אֵ֛ת אֲשֶׁר־יִשָּׂ֥א אֶת־שְׁמ֖וֹ לַשָּֽׁוְא׃ {פ}
references.english: You shall not swear falsely bybswear falsely by In contrast to others “take in vain.” the name of the ETERNAL your God; for GOD will not clear one who swears falsely by that name.
references.matched_snippet: אמר להם וכי לא אשא פנים לישראל

references.hebrew: לֹ֥א תִשָּׂ֛א אֶת־שֵֽׁם־יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֶ֖יךָ לַשָּׁ֑וְא כִּ֣י לֹ֤א יְנַקֶּה֙ יְהֹוָ֔ה אֵ֛ת אֲשֶׁר־יִשָּׂ֥א אֶת־שְׁמ֖וֹ לַשָּֽׁוְא׃ {ס}
references.english: You shall not swear falsely by the name of the E<small>TERNAL</small> your God; for G<small>OD</small> will not clear one who swears falsely by that name.
references.matched_snippet: אמר להם וכי לא אשא פנים לישראל

references.english: Remember the sabbath day and keep it holy.
references.matched_snippet: רבא אמר קרא זכור ושמור כל שישנו

references.hebrew: שָׁמ֛֣וֹר אֶת־י֥וֹם֩ הַשַּׁבָּ֖֨ת לְקַדְּשׁ֑֜וֹ כַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר צִוְּךָ֖֣ ׀ יְהֹוָ֥֣ה אֱלֹהֶֽ֗יךָ׃
references.english: Observe the sabbath day and keep it holy, as the E<small>TERNAL</small> your God has commanded you.
references.matched_snippet: רבא אמר קרא זכור ושמור כל שישנו

references.hebrew: כִּ֚י יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹֽהֵיכֶ֔ם ה֚וּא אֱלֹהֵ֣י הָֽאֱלֹהִ֔ים וַאֲדֹנֵ֖י הָאֲדֹנִ֑ים הָאֵ֨ל הַגָּדֹ֤ל הַגִּבֹּר֙ וְהַנּוֹרָ֔א אֲשֶׁר֙ לֹא־יִשָּׂ֣א פָנִ֔ים וְלֹ֥א יִקַּ֖ח שֹֽׁחַד׃
references.english: For the ETERNAL your God is God supreme and Sovereign supreme,eGod supreme and Sovereign supreme Lit. “the God of gods and the Sovereign of sovereigns.” the great, the mighty, and the awesome God, who shows no favor and takes no bribe,
references.matched_snippet: לא ישא פנים ולא יקח שחד והלא אתה נושא

references.english: GOD bestow favorgbestow favor Lit. “lift up His face.” upon you and grant you peace!hpeace Or “friendship.”
references.matched_snippet: פנים לישראל דכתיב ישא ה פניו אליך

references.hebrew: וְאָכַלְתָּ֖ וְשָׂבָ֑עְתָּ וּבֵֽרַכְתָּ֙ אֶת־יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֶ֔יךָ עַל־הָאָ֥רֶץ הַטֹּבָ֖ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר נָֽתַן־לָֽךְ׃
references.english: When you have eaten your fill, give thanks to the E<small>TERNAL</small> your God for the good land given to you.

references.hebrew: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר יְהֹוָ֤ה אֶל־מֹשֶׁה֙ לֵ֣ךְ אֶל־הָעָ֔ם וְקִדַּשְׁתָּ֥ם הַיּ֖וֹם וּמָחָ֑ר וְכִבְּס֖וּ שִׂמְלֹתָֽם׃
references.english: and GOD said to Moses, “Go to the people and warn them to stay purebpure Cf. v. 15. today and tomorrow. Let them wash their clothes.

references.hebrew: וּקְשַׁרְתָּ֥ם לְא֖וֹת עַל־יָדֶ֑ךָ וְהָי֥וּ לְטֹטָפֹ֖ת בֵּ֥ין עֵינֶֽיךָ׃
references.english: Bind them as a sign on your hand and let them serve as a symbolcsymbol In contrast to others “frontlet”; cf. Exod. 13.16. on your forehead;don your forehead Lit. “between your eyes”; cf. Exod. 13.9.
inscribe them on the doorposts of your house and on your gates.

references.hebrew: עֶ֤רֶב וָבֹ֣קֶר וְ֭צׇהֳרַיִם אָשִׂ֣יחָה וְאֶהֱמֶ֑ה וַיִּשְׁמַ֥ע קוֹלִֽי׃
references.english:
Evening, morning, and noon,
I complain and moan,
and my voice is heard.
references.matched_snippet: ובקר וצהרים כמצות עשה שהזמן גרמא דמי

references.hebrew: וְלִמַּדְתֶּ֥ם אֹתָ֛ם אֶת־בְּנֵיכֶ֖ם לְדַבֵּ֣ר בָּ֑ם בְּשִׁבְתְּךָ֤ בְּבֵיתֶ֙ךָ֙ וּבְלֶכְתְּךָ֣ בַדֶּ֔רֶךְ וּֽבְשׇׁכְבְּךָ֖ וּבְקוּמֶֽךָ׃ וּכְתַבְתָּ֛ם עַל־מְזוּז֥וֹת בֵּיתֶ֖ךָ וּבִשְׁעָרֶֽיךָ׃
references.english: and teach them to your children—reciting them when you stay at home and when you are away, when you lie down and when you get up; and inscribe them on the doorposts of your house and on your gates—

references.hebrew: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר מֹשֶׁ֗ה בְּתֵ֣ת יְהֹוָה֩ לָכֶ֨ם בָּעֶ֜רֶב בָּשָׂ֣ר לֶאֱכֹ֗ל וְלֶ֤חֶם בַּבֹּ֙קֶר֙ לִשְׂבֹּ֔עַ בִּשְׁמֹ֤עַ יְהֹוָה֙ אֶת־תְּלֻנֹּ֣תֵיכֶ֔ם אֲשֶׁר־אַתֶּ֥ם מַלִּינִ֖ם עָלָ֑יו וְנַ֣חְנוּ מָ֔ה לֹא־עָלֵ֥ינוּ תְלֻנֹּתֵיכֶ֖ם כִּ֥י עַל־יְהֹוָֽה׃
references.english: Since it is G<small>OD</small>,” Moses continued, “who will give you flesh to eat in the evening and bread in the morning to the full—because G<small>OD</small> has heard the grumblings you utter—what is our part? Your grumbling is against G<small>OD</small>, not against us!”
references.matched_snippet: וכתיב בתת ה לכם בערב בשר לאכל
